rationale: Art. VIII, §1-o authorizes tax-increase limitation agreements for rural economic development. It does not address or constrain the residence homestead exemption amount under Tax Code §11.13(b).
quote: the legislature by general law may authorize the governing body of a municipality having a population of less than 10,000
_note: No conflict; §1-o governs rural tax-freeze agreements, not homestead exemption levels.
